task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the WordPress admin dashboard, specifically navigated to the WooCommerce -> Settings -> Products tab.

task_completion.description: Enable reviews and require star ratings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes for 'Enable product reviews', 'Enable star rating on reviews', and 'Star ratings should be required, not optional' are checked, and the settings are saved.

task_completion.description: Access the Wireless Bluetooth Headphones product page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the storefront product page for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001).

task_completion.description: Verify the 5-star review for the headphones
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reviews section of the 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' page shows a submitted 5-star review. The review text must include the phrase 'noise cancellation'.

task_completion.description: Access the Organic Cotton T-Shirt product page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the storefront product page for 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' (SKU: OCT-BLK-M).

task_completion.description: Verify the 4-star review for the t-shirt
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reviews section of the 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' page shows a submitted 4-star review. The review text must include the phrase 'sizing down'.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to configure settings and submit reviews
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through the WordPress admin UI and storefront in a web browser, rather than using terminal commands (like wp-cli or curl) to bypass the graphical interface.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual WooCommerce interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The review forms and settings pages belong to the genuine WordPress/WooCommerce application, not a text editor or mocked-up page.

integrity.description: Agent did not manipulate the database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening a database management tool (like phpMyAdmin or a mysql terminal client) to insert the reviews directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires enabling three specific WooCommerce settings: 'Enable product reviews', 'Enable star rating on reviews', and 'Star ratings should be required'. The 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001) must have a 5-star review containing the keyword 'noise cancellation'. The 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' (SKU: OCT-BLK-M) must have a 4-star review containing the keyword 'sizing down'.
